title: lepidocupania globosa
side_effects: Lepidocupania globosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in individuals with sensitive skin or respiratory conditions. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts may cause cardiovascular problems, including high blood pressure and irregular heart rhythms. Additionally, Lepidocupania globosa may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse health effects.
